name: eventtrashbox
description: A custom WordPress theme for EventTrashBox.
author: Seth Tipton

scripts.build: npm run compile:css && npm run compile:rtl
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:scss
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:js -- --fix && npm run lint:scss -- --fix
scripts.bundle: dir-archiver --src . --dest ../eventtrashbox.zip --exclude .DS_Store .stylelintrc.json .stylelintignore .eslintrc .eslintrc.json .eslintignore .prettierrc.json .prettierignore .git .gitattributes .github .gitignore README.md node_modules vendor package-lock.json package.json .travis.yml sass style.css.map yarn.lock
